formulas.algeria_buy_price: Minimum usable Algeria listing price for same product/storage, converted to EUR, then USD through EUR/TRY divided by USD/TRY.
formulas.my_personal_gain: Tiered share of gross spread versus Turkiye benchmark from OpportunitySnapshot.gain_split.
formulas.supplier_usd: Raw SupplierPrice.supplier_price_usd. It is not derived from EUR.
formulas.discount_vs_supplier: proposed_buyer_price_usd - raw supplier_price_usd. Negative means proposed buyer price is below supplier benchmark.

selection_notes.supplier_only_basket: Supplier-list opportunities with positive buyer gain, BUY/WATCH signal, and proposed buyer price below raw supplier USD benchmark, greedily fit into EUR 3350 budget.
selection_notes.unlimited_top_opportunities: Exact 15-item dashboard-style unlimited-budget scenario requested in the session.
